name: My coworker saw the bad air too, how do witness statements help?
description: Proves conditions existed; get them notarized early.

mainEntity.name: My coworker saw the bad air too, how do witness statements help?

acceptedAnswer.text: Proves conditions existed; get them notarized early.
acceptedAnswer.description: **They corroborate exposure conditions, PPE failures, symptom onset.** Statements detail daily hazards like poor ventilation[3]. Key factors: Notarized affidavits; consistent with records; multiple strengthen. Courts weigh credibility. In Utah claims, they counter denials. Collect promptly before memories fade. Lawyer drafts ironclad ones.
